name: sem10_topic_method_grouping
description: Batch 14 SEM-10 eval slice for topic/method grouping with terminology drift, sparse keywords, and cross-cutting methods.

papers.title: Heavy neutral lepton sensitivity with displaced vertices
papers.abstract: We study sterile-neutrino discovery potential at the lifetime frontier.
papers.methodology: Detector-response emulation and pseudoexperiment template fits are used.

papers.title: Sterile-neutrino reinterpretation in long-lived lepton searches
papers.abstract: The heavy neutral lepton signal is modeled with response templates.
papers.methodology: Fast detector simulation and signal extraction templates are employed.

papers.title: Dispersive treatment of tetraquark line shapes
papers.abstract: We analyze exotic hadron spectroscopy with dispersion relations and unitarity.
papers.methodology: Partial-wave amplitudes are constrained by dispersion relations.

papers.title: Amplitude constraints on exotic hadron candidates
papers.abstract: The tetraquark spectrum is studied through analytic amplitudes.
papers.methodology: A dispersive amplitude model with bootstrap uncertainties is fitted.

papers.title: Operator constraints on semileptonic anomalies
papers.methodology: An effective field theory operator basis is globally fitted.

papers.title: SMEFT interpretation of rare B decays
papers.abstract: Flavor anomalies are interpreted in a Standard Model Effective Field Theory analysis.
papers.methodology: We perform a global SMEFT fit to semileptonic data.

papers.title: Finite-volume form-factor study
papers.abstract: Hadronic form factors are extracted from lattice correlators.
papers.methodology: Lattice ensembles and finite-volume correlators determine the matrix elements.

papers.title: Nonperturbative matrix elements on the lattice
papers.abstract: We compute hadronic form factors from gauge-field ensembles.
papers.methodology: A lattice Monte Carlo study extracts semileptonic matrix elements.

papers.title: Lattice-informed EFT constraints for rare decays
papers.abstract: Flavor anomalies are studied by combining lattice inputs with Wilson-coefficient fits.
papers.methodology: Lattice matrix elements are combined with an EFT operator analysis.

papers.title: Detector-level EFT reinterpretation of displaced signatures
papers.abstract: Heavy neutral leptons are constrained with detector reinterpretation and operator fits.
papers.methodology: Detector simulation is coupled to an effective theory parameter scan.

papers.title: Benchmark detector study for long-lived neutrinos
papers.abstract: Heavy neutral leptons are searched for with displaced-vertex strategies.
papers.methodology: A dedicated detector simulation with template fits is used.
